code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
for t in tokens
  match string.parse_int(t)
  when Some(n)
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut sums: List<Int> = []
mut total = 0
for n in nums
  total = total + n
  sums = list.push(sums, total)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for s in sums
  if first
    out = "#{s}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{s}"
  end
end
print(out)
